summary: Phase A Retouch + 3 Major Features - All backend tests PASSED (15/15), Frontend UI verified working. Partner-Review middle stage, Smart Discount Engine, AI Proposal Generator (GPT-5.2), Upsell Bundles CRUD all functional.
feature: Phase A Retouch: Partner-Review stage, AI Proposal Generator, Upsell Bundles, Enhanced Send-Proposal with discounts

backend_tests.auth: PASS - Admin and Partner login working
backend_tests.upsell_bundles_crud: PASS - GET auto-seeds 6 defaults, POST admin-only, resolve endpoint working
backend_tests.ai_proposal_generator: PASS - GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key generates 250-400 word proposals
backend_tests.partner_review_stage: PASS - client/submit transitions to partner_review, partner/forward-to-admin transitions to documents_submitted
backend_tests.enhanced_send_proposal: PASS - promo_code, additional_discount, upsell_bundle_ids all working with correct breakdown calculation
backend_tests.sales_strict_rule: PASS - Partner cannot create sale without pre_assessment_id OR bypass with reason (min 10 chars)

frontend_tests.partner_pipeline_stats: PASS - 6 stats cards including 'Needs Your Review' (pink, shows count)
frontend_tests.partner_review_badge: PASS - 'Awaiting Your Review' pink badge shown for partner_review stage PAs
frontend_tests.forward_to_admin_dialog: PASS - Remarks textarea + 'Forward to Admin' button (data-testid=confirm-forward)
frontend_tests.enhanced_proposal_form: PASS - Base Fee, Promo Code + Apply, Additional Discount, Notes, Upsell Bundles checkboxes (8), AI Generate button, AI Text area, Final Amount display, Submit button
frontend_tests.ai_generate_button: PASS - Generates proposal text (285 words in test), shows toast 'AI draft ready'
frontend_tests.upsell_bundles_manager: PASS - Admin sidebar has 'Upsell Bundles' under Planning Tools, shows 8 bundle cards, New Bundle button, inline form with Name/Amount/Description/Category/Active, edit/delete icons

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ProposalForm_Client PA (approved stage) and TEST_PartnerReview_Client PA for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Retouch fully verified. Key features: (1) Partner-Review middle stage - client submit goes to partner_review, partner forwards to admin which transitions to documents_submitted; (2) Upsell Bundles CRUD at /api/upsell-bundles with 6 auto-seeded defaults; (3) AI Proposal Generator at /api/ai-proposal/generate using GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key; (4) Enhanced send-proposal with promo_code, additional_discount, upsell_bundle_ids returning breakdown; (5) Sales strict rule - partner must have pre_assessment_id OR bypass_pre_assessment with reason (min 10 chars). All data-testids verified: proposal-fee, proposal-promo, apply-promo, proposal-add-discount, ai-generate-btn, proposal-ai-text, proposal-final, submit-proposal, forward-remarks, confirm-forward, upsell-bundles-manager, new-bundle-btn, save-bundle.
